meaning: adj.结实的,勇敢坚定的,激烈的,矮胖的,顽强的n.矮胖子,烈性啤酒
examples: Jacobs was a stout, florid man.
I hope you've both got stout shoes.
He put up a stout defence in court.
Kristie Lu Stout started her career in journalism in San Francisco at Wired magazine's online division.
Beers like Two Hundred fathoms illustrate how far Irish stout has come in the last few years.
